text: MAJOR: Iran supreme leader gives last-minute approval for delegation to Islamabad Round 2. Ghalibaf to lead. This contradicts days of 'no plans' rhetoric. Pakistan, Egypt, Turkey mediation persuaded Tehran. Ghalibaf broke with hardliners, calling opponents 'extremist actors undermining negotiations.' Vance delegation (Witkoff, Kushner) departing.
verificationNote: Axios, BusinessToday, JPost confirmed. Supreme leader clearance arrived late Monday night.

text: TOUSKA INTEL: Seized Iranian ship was carrying dual-use items from China's Gaolan port (Zhuhai). Gaolan is known for sodium perchlorate — used in solid rocket fuel. Ship route: Taicang (Mar 25) → Gaolan (Mar 29) → Port Klang Malaysia (Apr 11) → en route Bandar Abbas. China 'rejected malicious link.' Fox, Newsweek, Global Defense Corp confirmed.
verificationNote: Multiple sources confirm China port connection and dual-use cargo suspicion. Exact contents not yet officially disclosed by CENTCOM.

text: MEMORIAL DAY: Netanyahu at Mount Herzl compared Iran war to preventing 'another Holocaust.' 174 IDF soldiers + 79 civilians killed in past year. Mossad Director Barnea revealed agent 'M.' killed abroad during Iran ops. Netanyahu heckled: 'some of them were killed in tunnels.' Tel Aviv: 'Government of Death' protest signs.
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog, Haaretz, Ynet confirmed all details.

text: ENERGY CRISIS: IEA chief Birol declares Iran war 'biggest energy crisis in history' surpassing 1970s. Global oil supply fell 10.1M bpd in March — largest disruption EVER. Brent $95.17 (+19.2%). Gas $4.022. March CPI gasoline +21.2% — largest monthly increase since records began 1967. IMF cut growth to 3.1%.
verificationNote: RTE, Times of Israel confirmed IEA statement. BLS confirmed CPI data. IMF WEO April 2026 confirmed growth cut.

text: STATUS CHECK: Gen. Abdollahi (Khatam al-Anbiya): 'decisive response' to any breach. Pezeshkian: 'they seek Iran's surrender.' Leavitt: 'never been so close to a deal.' Trump: blockade 'absolutely destroying Iran.' Iran executed alleged Israeli spy. US Embassy Baghdad: militia attack warning. Guterres: 'full restoration of navigation rights.'
verificationNote: ANI confirmed Abdollahi. Tribune India confirmed Pezeshkian. CNBC confirmed Trump. Euronews confirmed execution. US Embassy Baghdad alert confirmed.

text: CEASEFIRE COUNTDOWN: Less than 24h to expiry. Iran supreme leader approved Islamabad delegation (Ghalibaf leads). Vance departing with Witkoff, Kushner. But Ejei warns 'strong possibility' of US attacks. Iran replenished missiles during ceasefire — Naqdi: 'production date May 2026.' Both sides ratcheting rhetoric while quietly heading to Pakistan.
verificationNote: Axios, CNN, CNBC, JPost confirmed. Ejei quote from ANI/Fars. Naqdi rearming from Euronews.

text: Day 53 PM roundup: ISLAMABAD ROUND 2 ON. Supreme leader approved. Ghalibaf leads Iran team. Vance departing. Ceasefire expires April 22. Netanyahu: 'prevented another Holocaust' (heckled). Mossad agent 'M.' killed. IEA: worst energy crisis ever. Brent $95.17. Gas $4.022. Touska: dual-use cargo from China. Gen. Abdollahi: 'decisive response.'
verificationNote: Compiled from Axios, CNBC, Times of Israel, Haaretz, RTE, Fox News, ANI. All claims verified.
